news.title:
C.E. Info Systems shows bearish momentum with steep decline, large red candles.
Lower highs, lower lows, and support breakdown signal continued weakness.
news.summary:

news.title:
C.E. Info Systems hits 52-week low at Rs 930.6 amid market downturn.
Broader market pressures and performance factors contributed to the decline.
news.summary:

news.title:
C.E. Info Systems fined for late related party transaction disclosure due to misinterpretation.
Disclosure filed, fine paid timely; board plans stronger systems to prevent future delays.
news.summary:
C.E. Info Systems fined for late related party transaction disclosure due to misinterpretation.
Disclosure filed, fine paid timely; board plans stronger systems to prevent future delays.

news.title:
C.E. Info Systems Ltd sees 9-fold volume surge to 9.91L shares, rising 2.9% to Rs.1,187.5.
Cohance Lifesciences, Apar Industries, Kajaria Ceramics, Godfrey Phillips also report significant volume spikes.
news.summary:
C.E. Info Systems Ltd sees 9-fold volume surge to 9.91L shares, rising 2.9% to Rs.1,187.5.
Cohance Lifesciences, Apar Industries, Kajaria Ceramics, Godfrey Phillips also report significant volume spikes.

news.title:
CE Info Systems targets Rs.1,000 crore revenue by FY28.
The company aims for a 35% EBITDA margin by FY26.
news.summary:
CE Info Systems targets Rs.1,000 crore revenue by FY28.
The company aims for a 35% EBITDA margin by FY26.

news.title:
C.E. Info Systems' Q3FY26 revenue stood at Rs 93.7 Cr with EBITDA margin of 28.6% and PAT margin of 18%.
Open order book increased to Rs 1770.7 Cr, and IoT-led business revenue rose 44% in 9MFY26.
news.summary:
C.E. Info Systems' Q3FY26 revenue stood at Rs 93.7 Cr with EBITDA margin of 28.6% and PAT margin of 18%.
Open order book increased to Rs 1770.7 Cr, and IoT-led business revenue rose 44% in 9MFY26.

news.title:
MapmyIndia's Q3 net profit dropped 42% YoY to ₹19 Cr, with revenue declining 18.2% YoY.
Sequentially, profit rose 1.3%, while revenue fell 17.7%; total income stood at ₹104.2 Cr.
news.summary:
MapmyIndia's Q3 net profit dropped 42% YoY to ₹19 Cr, with revenue declining 18.2% YoY.
Sequentially, profit rose 1.3%, while revenue fell 17.7%; total income stood at ₹104.2 Cr.

news.title:
C.E. Info Systems invests Rs 2 crore for 20% stake in Prashant Advanced Survey LLP.
The partnership aims to advance HD mapping and surveying initiatives in India.
news.summary:
C.E. Info Systems invests Rs 2 crore for 20% stake in Prashant Advanced Survey LLP.
The partnership aims to advance HD mapping and surveying initiatives in India.

news.title:
C.E. Info Systems posts Q3 revenue of ₹93.7 crore, net profit ₹18.8 crore.
Board approves ₹2 crore investment for 20% stake in HD mapping firm.
news.summary:
C.E. Info Systems posts Q3 revenue of ₹93.7 crore, net profit ₹18.8 crore.

news.title:
C.E. Info Systems Ltd to hold Q3 FY26 earnings call on 16 Feb 2026 at 12:00 PM IST.
Dial-in details and international access provided; event organized by DAM Capital Advisors.
news.summary:

news.title:
C.E. Info Systems Ltd invests Rs 2 crore in Iwayplus, acquiring a 6.06% stake via CCPS.
Iwayplus specializes in indoor navigation tech; acquisition supports MapmyIndia's strategic growth.
news.summary:
C.E. Info Systems Ltd invests Rs 2 crore in Iwayplus, acquiring a 6.06% stake via CCPS.
Iwayplus specializes in indoor navigation tech; acquisition supports MapmyIndia's strategic growth.

news.title:
C.E. Info Systems executed a block trade of ~280,215 shares at Rs. 1558.2.
The total trade value amounts to Rs. 43.7 crores.

news.title:
C.E. Info Systems Ltd received a demand order for ₹7.3 Cr ITC recovery, interest, and penalties from GST authorities.
The company plans to appeal, stating strong legal grounds and no immediate financial or operational impact.
news.summary:
C.E. Info Systems Ltd received a demand order for ₹7.3 Cr ITC recovery, interest, and penalties from GST authorities.
The company plans to appeal, stating strong legal grounds and no immediate financial or operational impact.

news.title:
Nexus Venture Partners closed a $700M fund to invest in AI, tech, consumer, and fintech startups in India and the US.
Its portfolio includes Zepto, Rapido, Jumbotail, MapmyIndia, Unacademy, and Neysa, showcasing focus on high-growth sectors.
news.summary:
Nexus Venture Partners closed a $700M fund to invest in AI, tech, consumer, and fintech startups in India and the US.
Its portfolio includes Zepto, Rapido, Jumbotail, MapmyIndia, Unacademy, and Neysa, showcasing focus on high-growth sectors.

news.title: MapMyIndia collaborates with Zoho to enhance its B2B location analytics portfolio.
news.summary: MapMyIndia collaborates with Zoho to enhance its B2B location analytics portfolio.

news.title:
MapmyIndia aims 20-25% revenue growth in FY26 with EBITDA margins near 40%.
Govt business contributes 20% revenue; shares down 8% YoY, mkt cap ₹9549.5 crore.
news.summary:
MapmyIndia aims 20-25% revenue growth in FY26 with EBITDA margins near 40%.
Govt business contributes 20% revenue; shares down 8% YoY, mkt cap ₹9549.5 crore.

news.title:
MapmyIndia secured ₹110 crore contracts with IOCL and Survey of India, expanding its government segment.
Revenue grew 14.7% YoY to ₹235.4 crore; shares of C.E. Info Systems fell 4.6% to ₹1,741.
news.summary:
MapmyIndia secured ₹110 crore contracts with IOCL and Survey of India, expanding its government segment.
Revenue grew 14.7% YoY to ₹235.4 crore; shares of C.E. Info Systems fell 4.6% to ₹1,741.

news.title:
C.E. Info Systems reports declining profit and net sales for Sep 2025 quarter.
Despite challenges, it posted strong operating cash flow and 9-month revenue growth.
news.summary:
C.E. Info Systems reports declining profit and net sales for Sep 2025 quarter.

news.title:
C E Info Systems Ltd aims for Rs 1000 crore revenue by FY28.
The company is focusing on achieving 35-40% margin during this period.

news.title:
MapMyIndia Q2 FY26 net profit dropped 39% YoY to INR 18.5 Cr.
Operating revenue grew 10% YoY but fell 6% sequentially to INR 113.8 Cr.
news.summary:
